sys_script.name: AI License Evaluation Gatekeeper

sys_update_version.name: sys_script_8f6549459390c310b439f04bdd03d67a
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sys_script"><sys_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><abort_action>false</abort_action><access>package_private</access><action_delete>false</action_delete><action_insert>true</action_insert><action_query>false</action_query><action_update>true</action_update><active>true</active><add_message>false</add_message><advanced>true</advanced><change_fields>false</change_fields><client_callable>false</client_callable><collection>x_1977323_smartlic_license_audit</collection><condition/><description/><execute_function>false</execute_function><filter_condition table="x_1977323_smartlic_license_audit">days_inactiveVALCHANGES^EQ<item endquery="false" field="days_inactive" goto="false" newquery="false" operator="VALCHANGES" or="false" value=""/><item endquery="true" field="" goto="false" newquery="false" operator="=" or="false" value=""/></filter_condition><is_rest>false</is_rest><message/><name>AI License Evaluation Gatekeeper</name><order>100</order><priority>100</priority><rest_method/><rest_method_text/><rest_service/><rest_service_text/><rest_variables/><role_conditions/><script><![CDATA[(function executeRule(current, previous /*null when async*/) {

    // 1. Fetch our dynamic system properties
    var inactivityThreshold = parseInt(gs.getProperty('x_1977323_smartlic.inactivity_days', 90));
    var aiGate = parseInt(gs.getProperty('x_1977323_smartlic.ai_threshold', 70));
    
    // 2. SIMULATE Now Assist AI Score Calculation
    var simulatedScore = 0;
    var simulatedJustification = "";
    
    // Pure sequential logic path: Compare actual days against the dynamic property
    if (current.days_inactive >= inactivityThreshold) {
        // Assign a score safely above the aiGate
        simulatedScore = 95; 
        simulatedJustification = "AI Assessment: User has reached the system inactivity limit of " + inactivityThreshold + " days. High confidence to revoke.";
    } else {
        // Assign a score below the aiGate for manual review
        simulatedScore = 40;
        simulatedJustification = "AI Assessment: User is under the inactivity threshold. Human review recommended.";
    }
    
    // 3. Apply the findings to the record
    current.ai_confidence_score = simulatedScore;
    current.ai_justification = simulatedJustification;
    
    // 4. The Logic Gate: Compare the final score against the ai_threshold property
    if (simulatedScore >= aiGate) {
        current.review_status = 'auto_revoked';
        
        // --- LOG THE FINANCIAL SAVINGS ---
        current.amount_saved = 1200; // $1,200 saved per revoked ITIL license
        
        // --- ZERO-TOUCH AUTOMATION ENGINE ---
        // The system hunts down the actual role and deletes it
        var roleToRemove = new GlideRecord('sys_user_has_role');
        roleToRemove.addQuery('user', current.target_user); 
        roleToRemove.addQuery('role.name', 'itil'); 
        roleToRemove.query();
        
        if (roleToRemove.next()) {
            roleToRemove.deleteRecord();
        }
        
    } else {
        current.review_status = 'pending_review';
        current.amount_saved = 0; // Ensure savings is 0 if not revoked
    }

})(current, previous);]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>Taiba.Eijaz</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-04-15 07:07:13</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>8f6549459390c310b439f04bdd03d67a</sys_id><sys_mod_count>3</sys_mod_count><sys_name>AI License Evaluation Gatekeeper</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="SmartLicenseHub" source="x_1977323_smartlic">57b8b93c93184310b439f04bdd03d6b3</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="SmartLicenseHub">57b8b93c93184310b439f04bdd03d6b3</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_8f6549459390c310b439f04bdd03d67a</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-04-19 12:24:59</sys_updated_on><template/><when>before</when></sys_script><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=8f6549459390c310b439f04bdd03d67a"/></record_update>
